jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Roche India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Roche India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
